species.credit_text: Credit to Princess-Phoenix for Pythonova via Pokengine Mongratis. Pack owner/maintainer: Plouton. Source page: https://pokengine.org/mons/00rgw87i/Pythonova?collection=107s7x9x. Use with credit for non-commercial fangames.
species.creator: Princess-Phoenix
species.name: Pythonova
species.pokedex_entry: It is short-tempered and when enraged, the flames on it's back burn hotter and it's smoke tail becomes thicker and longer. It uses it's smoke tail to coil around and smother it's target.
species.notes:
Concept, design, sprite, name, type, and dex flavor by Princess-Phoenix This fakemon originates from Princess-Phoenix's 'Project Freemon' on DeviantArt. "It is a very long snake fakemon thanks to the smoke tail, but if the smoke is removed its actual body is hilariously short and front heavy, with its tail tip ending a little beyond where the darker grey tail smoke starts. Like the rest of its line the high heat contained in its body and smoke act as a hot air balloon and allows it to hover in the air or fly around. " Evo line: Complete

Dropped unsupported teach moves during import prep: Vise Grip

species.credit_text: Credit to KajiAtsui for Sunnydra via Pokengine Mongratis. Pack owner/maintainer: Plouton. Source page: https://pokengine.org/mons/00yys19h/Sunnydra?collection=107s7x9x. Use with credit for non-commercial fangames.
species.creator: KajiAtsui
species.name: Sunnydra
species.pokedex_entry: On sunny days, they sit very still with their faces turned to the sun, soaking in the warmth. If disturbed, they become highly aggressive.
species.notes: Designed and Sprited by KajiAtsui Originally made for Atsui Dex . Battle details by Plouton

species.credit_text: Credit to Princess-Phoenix for Cobarett via Pokengine Mongratis. Pack owner/maintainer: Plouton. Source page: https://pokengine.org/mons/002qrwwn/Cobarett?collection=107s7x9x. Use with credit for non-commercial fangames.
species.creator: Princess-Phoenix
species.name: Cobarett
species.pokedex_entry: It covers itself in thick, billowing smoke so that it can slide easily through thick brush. THe source of the smoke is its molten body temperature, which is so hot that tongues of flame shoot from it's mouth.
species.notes:
Concept, design, sprite, name, type, and dex flavor by Princess-Phoenix This fakemon originates from Princess-Phoenix's 'Project Freemon' on DeviantArt. Etymology: "Cobarett's name is a mix of Cobra and Comet" Evo line: Complete

Dropped unsupported teach moves during import prep: Vise Grip

species.credit_text: Credit to Princess-Phoenix for Hissiorite via Pokengine Mongratis. Pack owner/maintainer: Plouton. Source page: https://pokengine.org/mons/00ptxzlq/Hissiorite?collection=107s7x9x. Use with credit for non-commercial fangames.
species.creator: Princess-Phoenix
species.name: Hissiorite
species.pokedex_entry: The base of it's neck emits super-heated gas that envelopes it's body and causes it to hover a few inches off the ground, similar to a hot air balloon. Because of this, it can travel quickly, even over water.
species.notes:
Concept, design, sprite, name, type, and dex flavor by Princess-Phoenix This fakemon originates from Princess-Phoenix's 'Project Freemon' on DeviantArt. "Hissiorite's line is based on a snake and is inspired by shooting stars entering the atmosphere. The name is a combination of Meteorite + Hissing." Evo line: Complete

Dropped unsupported teach moves during import prep: Vise Grip

species.credit_text: Credit to Princess-Phoenix for Merlicun via Pokengine Mongratis. Pack owner/maintainer: Plouton. Source page: https://pokengine.org/mons/00vfbxmp/Merlicun?collection=107s7x9x. Use with credit for non-commercial fangames.
species.creator: Princess-Phoenix
species.name: Merlicun
species.pokedex_entry: Merlicun is a hardy insect creature that has evolved to be efficient at both attack and defense. They gather in the tree canopies of ancient forests to feed on fruits and leaves. When threatened they will first size up their opponent. If they feel as though they can win they will relentlessly headbutt their foe. But, if they appear to be overpowered they will compress their body into what resembles pupae and focus on defending themselves.
species.notes:
Concept, design, sprite, name, type, size, weight, ability, and dex flavor by Princess-Phoenix This fakemon originates from Princess-Phoenix's 'Project Freemon' on DeviantArt. "This is Merlicun, which is designed as sort of half larva/half pupae. They evolve at high levels, and so they are far stronger than they initially appear to be." Evo line: Complete

Dropped unsupported teach moves during import prep: Cuddle, Jumpscare, Swarming Terrain, Thread Lash
